chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Charity

text: 1728 - قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «أَرْضُ اَلْقِيَامَةِ نَارٌ مَا خَلاَ ظِلَّ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ فَإِنَّ صَدَقَتَهُ تُظِلُّهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1728 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"The ground of the Day of Resurrection will be fire, except for the shade provided for the believer, for his charity will shield him."
